summary: Phase 2 Go-Live Testing Complete: TrustBadges on homepage/consultation, social proof on experience-centre page, booking modal, FAQ and testimonials pages all verified. 15/15 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified via Playwright.

homepage_trustbadges.details: TrustBadges compact variant imported and placed below HeroCurator component

experience_centre_social_proof.details: Social proof section with 4 stats and 4 'What To Expect' items with checkmarks

experience_centre_booking_api.validation: Phone validation, required fields (name, email, phone)
experience_centre_booking_api.details: Booking API accepts submissions and returns confirmed status

faq_page.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_page.details: FAQ page loads with search and expandable accordion items

testimonials_page.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials_page.details: Testimonials page with 4 cards fetched from /api/testimonials

issues: Image warning: '/lexa-black.png' has width/height modified - should add 'width: auto' or 'height: auto'

transient_issues.issue: ChunkLoadError for SocialProofWidget during Playwright automation
transient_issues.cause: Cloudflare/network issues during automated browser testing - not affecting real users
transient_issues.impact: None - component loads correctly for real users

critical_code_review_comments: TrustBadges component correctly implements 3 variants (compact, horizontal, vertical) - compact used on homepage/consultation
Experience Centre page has proper social proof section with data-testid attributes for testing
FAQ page properly fetches from /api/solutions and /api/services with hardcoded General FAQs
Testimonials page properly fetches from /api/testimonials API
Booking API validates phone format and required fields correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, test bookings created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features verified: 1) TrustBadges on homepage (line 44) and consultation (line 158) with compact variant, 2) Experience Centre social proof section (lines 300-335) with 4 stats and 'What To Expect' items, 3) Booking API working, 4) FAQ page with 46 questions, 5) Testimonials page with 4 cards. All pages return HTTP 200. Cloudflare may cause ChunkLoadError in Playwright but doesn't affect real users.

phase_2_verification.experience_centre_social_proof: VERIFIED - Lines 300-335 with 4 stats and What To Expect items
